ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: Chou blanc 50%, garniture 50% (viande de porc 29%, viande bovine 28%, chou blanc, eau, farine de blé, oignons, sel iodé (sel, iodate de potassium), épices (poivre blanc, coriandre, piment chili, carvi), levure, dextrose),
